### Ton Hire

**Ton Hire has always been recognised as a leading supplier of short-and long-term hire vehicles. Our aim is to offer individuals and organisations modern quality vehicles with competitive rates while maintaining excellent customer services.**

Ton Hire has spent many years positioning itself as a quality hire service in Paddock Wood, Tonbridge, Tunbridge Wells, Sevenoaks, Maidstone, and the surrounding areas.

[Find Out More About Ton Hire](https://tonhire.com/about-us/).

## Our location

Ton Hire for car and van hire is based in Paddock Wood, situated between Tonbridge, Tunbridge Wells and Maidstone. 25 miles South East London, close to the M25 and M20 with commuter-friendly rail links to London, Ashford & Dover.

We have free parking available for our customers for the duration of your hire. Alternatively, we are 5 minutes walk from Paddock Wood railway station and the Tunbridge Wells to Maidstone bus routes pass our door.

Ton Hire began vehicle hire over 40 years ago therefore has a wealth of experience with a large established customer base. We have a large and varied hire fleet including cars, vans and dropside vehicles.

## What our customers say

Very pleased with the service from Ton Hire. Hired a 7.5 tonne lorry for our house move. Unlimited mileage for a 3 day hire, which was a great help, with no added costs at end of hire period. Very efficient service. Highly recommended.

**Mr D Lock**

Finally home after 5 countries and 1600 miles thanks Tonhire. Loaded in Berlin.

[![C23 Berlin](http://tonhire.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/07/C23-Berlin-300x225.jpg)](http://tonhire.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/07/C23-Berlin.jpg)
